subcodes.title: Words to Lua Getsinger in June 1912
subcodes.first_line: I appoint you, Lua, the Herald of the Covenant. And I am the Covenant, appointed by Bahá’u’lláh.
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
